goal: Develop and deploy a continuous monitoring solution for VMware Workstation that detects anomalies, proposes corrections, and sends desktop notifications.

tasks.instruction: Write a PowerShell script named 'MonitorVMware.ps1' that continuously monitors VMware Workstation ('vmware-vmx' processes) for CPU and Memory anomalies. The script must formulate a correction proposal when thresholds are exceeded and trigger a native Windows desktop notification (using System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon or similar) with the proposal. Save this script to the automation vault.
Run the saved 'MonitorVMware.ps1' script as a background daemon to activate the continuous monitoring solution.
